ItacPersonItem.Notes: The nephew of Sperone Speroni, he was lector of moral philosophy in Milan (`scuole canobiane`), then lector of mathematics in the Accademia degli Inquieti, and subsequently in the Accademia Delia in Padua. See his biography by Augusto de Ferrari in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
